output.summary: Successfully implemented architectural revisions to the Tabs block: (1) Removed duplicate tab title by making summary visible on desktop with appropriate styling, (2) Moved background color and rounded corners from panels container to individual details elements, (3) Moved sticky positioning to inner wrapper div inside details, (4) Removed color class toggling from JavaScript as each details now handles its own color and background.

filesModified.purpose: Removed duplicate desktop title, made summary visible on desktop with responsive styling, added tabs-item-inner wrapper with sticky positioning, moved md:bg-accent-lighter to details element
Removed duplicate desktop title h3, made summary visible on desktop with responsive styling, added tabs-item-inner wrapper with sticky positioning, moved md:bg-accent-lighter to details element
Removed md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl md:p-6 from tabs-panels container, leaving only flex layout classes
Removed md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl md:p-6 from tabs-panels container, leaving only flex layout classes
Removed color class toggling logic from selectTab function - no longer needed as each details element has its own color class and background

revisions.title: Remove duplicate tab title in content panel
revisions.description: Made the <summary> element visible on desktop instead of hiding it with md:!hidden. Removed the separate desktop-only h3.tabs-item-desktop-title. The summary now serves both mobile and desktop with responsive styling.
changes: Added md:text-[2.5rem] to summary h3 for desktop sizing
Added md:mb-8 to summary for desktop spacing
Added md:p-0 to summary to remove mobile padding on desktop
Added md:hidden to plus/minus icon container (mobile-only)
Removed the duplicate h3.tabs-item-desktop-title element entirely

revisions.title: Move background color and sticky to details + inner div
revisions.description: Restructured so each <details> element handles its own background styling. Added a tabs-item-inner wrapper div that holds the sticky positioning instead of the details element.
changes: Removed md:sticky md:top-[calc(...)] from details element
Added md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl to details element
Created new div.tabs-item-inner wrapper around tabs-item-content
Moved sticky positioning to tabs-item-inner: md:sticky md:top-[calc(var(--fixed-elements-height)+32px)] md:self-start
Removed md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl md:p-6 from .tabs-panels container
Removed md:rounded-none from details (no longer needed)
Each open details now shows its own background with its own color class applied

revisions.title: Clean up Tabs.js
revisions.description: Removed the color class toggling logic from the selectTab function. This is no longer needed because each <details> element has its own tabColor class and handles its own background color.
changes: Removed code that reads data-tab-color attribute from tab buttons
Removed code that removes color classes from panels container
Removed code that adds active tab's color class to panels container
Simplified selectTab function to only manage tab button states and details open/close

before.panelsContainer: Had md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl md:p-6, received color classes via JS
before.detailsElement: Had md:sticky positioning, had md:border-0 md:rounded-none

after.panelsContainer: Simple flex container with gap-4 md:gap-0 only
after.detailsElement: Has md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl, has tabColor class, no sticky positioning
after.tabsItemInner: New wrapper div with md:sticky positioning
after.summary: Visible on both mobile and desktop with responsive h3 sizing
after.content: No duplicate title, summary serves both mobile and desktop

warnings: webpack performance warnings (asset size limits) - expected and not blocking
eslint exhaustive-deps warning in Tabs.tsx - expected, intentional pattern to avoid infinite loops

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structures match exactly. All responsive classes, element hierarchy, and conditional rendering are in sync.

testPage.notes: No changes needed to test page. Existing variations will demonstrate the new structure.

fixesApplied.description: Eliminated duplicate tab title by making summary visible on desktop
fixesApplied.impact: Cleaner HTML structure, no content duplication, summary element serves both mobile and desktop

fixesApplied.description: Moved background styling to individual details elements
fixesApplied.impact: Each tab panel manages its own background and color independently, no JS color toggling needed

fixesApplied.description: Moved sticky positioning from details to inner wrapper
fixesApplied.impact: Proper sticky behavior with the new background structure

fixesApplied.description: Removed unnecessary color class toggling from JavaScript
fixesApplied.impact: Simpler JS, fewer DOM mutations, color management handled purely via CSS and HTML attributes

notes: The summary element now serves both mobile and desktop, with the h3 sized at text-header-3 on mobile and md:text-[2.5rem] on desktop
The plus/minus icon is hidden on desktop with md:hidden, only visible on mobile
Each details element has its own md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl, so only the open tab shows its colored background on desktop
The tabs-item-inner wrapper div provides the sticky positioning that was previously on the details element
JavaScript no longer needs to manage color classes - each details has its own tabColor class applied from PHP
The tabColor class on each details element overrides --accent-color for both mobile (open:bg-accent) and desktop (md:bg-accent-lighter)
TSX and PHP are perfectly in sync with identical structure and responsive classes
